title: Fractal World
description:
This mod will convert your world into a fractal! There are a lot of super customizable options, so you can make any type of fractal you want!

You can change the scale, iteration count, fractal preset, choose 2d or 3d fractals, and so much more!
body:
This mod will completely reshape your world into a fractal!

If you would like to explore fractals in Minecraft, then this is the best mod for that! All parts of the fractal are procedurally generated to whatever settings you give it.

Currently, the math for the fractal will determine the height of the world, or the color of the world, depending on what setting you leave it at. It will shift the entire world collumn up or down to acheive this. This could be a fun map to play on if you set the fractal to a huge size.

All commands start with: FractalWorld

For more information, check out this video!
[https://youtu.be/sr-jc9dCAQ4](https://youtu.be/sr-jc9dCAQ4)
